---
species: "Pagurus sp."
accepted_code: "PASP"
alternate_codes: "" 
diminutive: ""
alternate_diminutives: ""
common_name: "Hermit crab"
field_id_possible:
  - yes
description: "soft asymmetrical abdomens" 
image: '/header_images/pagurus_sp.jpg'
image_credit: 'Image by Philippe Guillaume via iNaturalist via https://www.inaturalist.org/taxa/48173-Pagurus' 
categories:
  - crustaceans
sampling_programs:
    - bhi_quadrat
    - bhi_rov
    - bhi_bruv
    - bhi_farms
habitat:
  - intertidal
  - subtidal
mobility:
  - mobile
sampling_region:
  - GOM
  - Virginian
catami_code: 
catami_version: "1.4"
worms_code: 106854  
---


**Other images:** <!-- Other images with attribution -->
<br/>

**Distinguishing features:** size ranges from a few millimeters to 8 cm, right handed as right pincer is larger and inhabits gastropod shells, a key identifier, can live in upper intertidal to deep sea 
<br/>

**Easily confused species and differentiation:** 

<br/>

**Extended Description:** <!-- Extended description -->

<!-- link to worms page -->
